name: Potatoes Gremolada
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flat-leaf parsley - leaves; loosely packed
2 lb Small red potatoes - unpeeled and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1) Using a sharp vegetable peeler, carefully cut away the zest of the lemon in strips, avoiding any bitter white pith. Finely chop the zest along with the parsley and garlic.
2) Place the potatoes in a medium saucepan and add enough water to cover them by 1 inch. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce the heat to moderately high and cook until tender, approximately 15 minutes.
3) Drain the potatoes in a colander and return them to the saucepan. Using a potato masher, mash the potatoes over very low heat, gradually incorporating the heavy cream and butter. Stir in the salt and gremolada, then serve immediately.
